response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with strong recent TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and current AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq that directly maps to the role's AI agent development requirement. Polyglot background (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Swift), MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker/Kubernetes, and a documented TDD/craftsmanship discipline cover the core stack. Notable gaps are Nest.js and Vitest not being explicitly listed, but the breadth and adjacency make these low-risk.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React + AWS CDK at Optilyz
Active AI-agent and MCP code-generator work at re:cinq matches a key requirement
Strong testing/craftsmanship culture (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, workshops, own test framework)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Vitest not mentioned (Jest/Selenium/own D test runner instead)
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (robotic arms, NI era)

key_factors.factor: Recent TypeScript + Node.js + React fullstack delivery
Missing Nest.js and Vitest in stated stack
